summary: Full E2E testing of the Account Logo bug fix on /accounts/:id passed. Backend endpoints (POST/DELETE /api/accounts/{id}/logo + /api/static/logos serving) verified via pytest (6/6 pass). Frontend view-mode shows a large 176x176 thumbnail with the actual image rendered (naturalWidth=300), the 'Dimensions: 40mm x 40mm' text, working Preview (opens fullscreen dialog via both the Preview button and clicking the thumbnail), Download from the thumbnail area (PNG file downloaded), and Download from inside the preview dialog. Edit-mode LogoUploader accepts JPG/PNG (accept='.jpg,.jpeg,.png,.webp,image/jpeg,image/png,image/webp'); PNG upload and JPG upload both go through the crop dialog, Save Logo triggers 'Logo saved successfully' toast, and the account persists logo_url + dimensions in the backend. Teardown completed (DELETE /api/accounts/b529f00e.../logo returned 200 and account now has logo_url:null).
critical_code_review_comments: Duplicate/stale logo endpoint: server.py has an active JSON-based POST/DELETE /api/accounts/{id}/logo, but routes/accounts.py still contains a multipart-form-data logo endpoint that is shadowed. E1 already noted this in agent_to_agent_context_note — recommend removing the dead code in routes/accounts.py to avoid future confusion.
AccountDetail.js is now 3715 lines — well above the 700-line guideline. Consider splitting sections (logo, invoices, contacts, delivery-address) into sub-components for maintainability.

getAccountLogoSrc() builds src as `${REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL}${account.logo_url}`. This works because logo_url starts with '/api/...', but the assumption is implicit. Consider a small guard (leading slash) for future robustness.

No cache-busting on the logo src in view mode. After a fresh upload the URL is unchanged (id.png), so browsers may show a stale image until refresh. Consider appending ?v=updated_at when logo_url changes.
Backend upload_account_logo silently accepts any width_mm/height_mm ints — no upper bound. Frontend caps at 10-200mm; adding server-side validation (Pydantic Field(ge=10, le=200)) would harden it.
test_credentials: CEO login used: surya.yadavalli@nylaairwater.earth / test123 (session_token cookie + Authorization Bearer).
seed_data_creation: None. Uploaded transient test PNG/JPG images (200x200) during upload verification; teardown DELETE cleared them and reset account b529f00e-54b3-4709-92c1-db08137ef0b3 to no-logo state as requested.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Account b529f00e-54b3-4709-92c1-db08137ef0b3 (The Rameshwaram Cafe) has NO logo after this run (per teardown). If future tests need the 40x40mm logo pre-populated, re-upload via POST /api/accounts/{id}/logo with base64 PNG data URL. Reusable pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/test_account_logo.py covers upload/serve/delete + JPG source acceptance and includes fixture-based teardown that restores the original snapshot at test-module scope.
rca of the issue: Original bug (thumbnail blank + no download) was already fixed by E1 before this testing run: (1) view-mode thumbnail enlarged to w-44 (176x176px), (2) Preview + Download buttons wired in both the thumbnail area and the fullscreen Dialog, (3) getAccountLogoSrc() correctly resolves logo_url via REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL prefix (verified: image loads with naturalWidth=300 from /api/static/logos/{id}.png), (4) handleDownloadLogo() uses fetch→blob→anchor.download to trigger a browser download (verified via Playwright expect_download). LogoUploader still accepts .jpg/.jpeg/.png/.webp both by extension and MIME. Backend POST endpoint decodes base64 (strips data-URL prefix) and persists to /app/backend/static/logos/{id}.png — works for both PNG and JPG source uploads because the crop dialog re-encodes to PNG data URL via canvas.toDataURL('image/png'). All verified end-to-end.
